sentences.translationEn: He told the driver the address.

sentences.translation: Vozač je pitao koliko će trebati da stigne.
sentences.translationEn: The driver asked how long it would take to arrive.

sentences.arabic: وَصَلَا فِي عِشْرِينَ دَقِيقَةً وَدَفَعَ سَعِيدٌ الأُجْرَةَ.
sentences.translation: Stigli su za dvadeset minuta i Said je platio.
sentences.translationEn: They arrived in twenty minutes and Said paid the fare.
